---
title: "APEC Projects (2006–2026)"
author: "Luis Felipe ACOSTA ZAVALETA"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: lumen
editor: visual
server: shiny
---

```{r}
#| context: setup
#| include: false

library(shiny)
library(DT)
library(rio)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(plotly)
library(bslib)
library(paletteer)
library(rlang)
library(tidyr)
library(fontawesome)

# -------- Color palettes --------
pal       <- as.character(paletteer_d("fishualize::Epinephelus_lanceolatus"))
trend_pal <- as.character(paletteer_d("RColorBrewer::Dark2"))

cols <- list(
  year_bar  = pal[1], forum_bar = pal[1],
  heat_low  = pal[3], heat_mid  = pal[2], heat_high = pal[1],
  apec      = pal[1], cofund    = pal[2], other     = pal[3], total = pal[1]
)

# -------- Global helpers --------
clean_num <- function(x) {
  if (is.numeric(x)) return(x)
  as.numeric(str_replace_all(x, "[,$]", ""))
}

# Expand a ';'-separated column into individual trimmed rows
unnest_semicolon <- function(df, col) {
  col_sym <- sym(col)
  df |>
    filter(!is.na(!!col_sym)) |>
    mutate(!!col_sym := str_split(!!col_sym, ";")) |>
    unnest(!!col_sym) |>
    mutate(!!col_sym := str_trim(!!col_sym)) |>
    filter(!!col_sym != "")
}

# Expand and add fractional weight per category (economy / topic)
build_long_split <- function(df, col, weight_col = NULL) {
  unnest_semicolon(df, col) |>
    group_by(project_year, project_number) |>
    mutate(n_cat = n(),
           part  = if (!is.null(weight_col)) .data[[weight_col]] / n_cat else 1 / n_cat) |>
    ungroup()
}

# Compute annual totals and percentage share per group
agg_with_share <- function(agg_df, value_col) {
  totals <- agg_df |>
    group_by(project_year) |>
    summarise(total_year = sum(.data[[value_col]], na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
  agg_df |>
    left_join(totals, by = "project_year") |>
    mutate(share = if_else(total_year > 0, 100 * .data[[value_col]] / total_year, 0))
}

choices_from       <- function(x) sort(unique(na.omit(x)))
split_choices_from <- function(x) {
  vals <- str_trim(unlist(str_split(x, ";")))
  sort(unique(vals[!is.na(vals) & vals != ""]))
}

# -------- Import and clean data --------
bd <- import("apec_approved_projects.xlsx")
names(bd) <- trimws(names(bd))

bd <- bd |>
  mutate(
    self_funded = fund_account == "Self-Funded",
    across(c(apec_funding, co_funding_amount, total_project_value, project_cost_usd), clean_num),
    total_project_budget    = if_else(self_funded, project_cost_usd, total_project_value),
    apec_funding            = if_else(self_funded | is.na(apec_funding),      0, apec_funding),
    co_funding_amount       = if_else(self_funded | is.na(co_funding_amount), 0, co_funding_amount),
    econ_contribution       = if_else(self_funded, total_project_budget, co_funding_amount),
    sub_fund                = if_else(self_funded, "None",           sub_fund),
    project_session         = if_else(self_funded, "Not Applicable", project_session),
    committee               = na_if(trimws(committee),               ""),
    other_fora_involved     = na_if(trimws(other_fora_involved),     ""),
    co_sponsoring_economies = na_if(trimws(co_sponsoring_economies), ""),
    committee               = if_else(is.na(committee),               "Not Applicable / Other", committee),
    other_fora_involved     = if_else(is.na(other_fora_involved),     "Not Applicable / Other", other_fora_involved),
    co_sponsoring_economies = if_else(is.na(co_sponsoring_economies), "None",                   co_sponsoring_economies)
  ) |>
  relocate(total_project_budget, econ_contribution, .after = co_funding_amount) |>
  select(-self_funded, -project_cost_usd, -total_project_value) |>
  select(
    project_title, project_number, proposing_economy, project_year,
    sponsoring_forum, committee, topics, project_status, project_session,
    co_sponsoring_economies, fund_account, sub_fund,
    total_project_budget, apec_funding, co_funding_amount, econ_contribution,
    other_fora_involved, organization_1, organization_2, everything()
  )

# -------- Filter choices --------
year_choices          <- choices_from(bd$project_year)
forum_choices         <- choices_from(bd$sponsoring_forum)
status_choices        <- choices_from(bd$project_status)
fund_choices          <- choices_from(bd$fund_account)
subfund_choices       <- choices_from(bd$sub_fund)
session_choices       <- choices_from(bd$project_session)
committee_choices     <- choices_from(bd$committee)
project_title_choices <- choices_from(bd$project_title)
economy_choices       <- split_choices_from(bd$proposing_economy)
co_spons_choices      <- setdiff(split_choices_from(bd$co_sponsoring_economies), "None")
topics_choices        <- split_choices_from(bd$topics)
```

##  {.sidebar width="370px"}

```{r}
#| panel: sidebar

tagList(
  accordion(
    id = "filters_acc", open = "Main filters", width = "200%",

    accordion_panel(
      "Main filters",
      selectInput("year_filter",      "Year:",              choices = year_choices,      multiple = TRUE),
      selectInput("economy_filter",   "Proposing economy:", choices = economy_choices,   multiple = TRUE),
      selectInput("forum_filter",     "Forum:",             choices = forum_choices,     multiple = TRUE),
      selectInput("committee_filter", "Committee:",         choices = committee_choices, multiple = TRUE),
      selectInput("topics_filter",    "Topic:",             choices = topics_choices,    multiple = TRUE),
      selectInput("status_filter",    "Status:",            choices = status_choices,    multiple = TRUE)
    ),

    accordion_panel(
      "Advanced filters",
      selectInput("session_filter",  "Session:",    choices = session_choices,  multiple = TRUE),
      selectInput("co_spons_filter", "Co-sponsor:", choices = co_spons_choices, multiple = TRUE),
      selectInput("fund_filter",     "Fund:",       choices = fund_choices,     multiple = TRUE),
      selectInput("subfund_filter",  "Sub-fund:",   choices = subfund_choices,  multiple = TRUE),
      selectizeInput(
        "title_filter", "Project title:", choices = project_title_choices,
        multiple = TRUE, options = list(placeholder = "Type text...", maxOptions = 100)
      )
    )
  ),

  actionButton(
    "reset_filters", "Reset filters",
    class = "btn btn-sm btn-secondary",
    style = "font-size:13px;padding:8px 20px;height:50px;line-height:20px;margin-top:10px;"
  ),
  downloadButton(
    "download_xlsx", "Download XLSX",
    class = "btn btn-sm btn-primary",
    style = "font-size:13px;padding:8px 20px;height:50px;line-height:20px;margin-top:10px;"
  ),

  tags$hr(),
  tags$p(
    "This dashboard was developed using publicly available data from the ",
    tags$a(href = "https://pdb.apec.org/", "APEC Project Database"), ".",
    style = "font-size:12px; color:#555; margin-top:6px;"
  )
)
```

```{r}
#| context: server

# -------- Server helpers --------
clean_sel <- function(x) if (is.null(x) || !length(x)) NULL else x

filter_ids <- c(
  "title_filter", "year_filter", "forum_filter", "topics_filter", "economy_filter",
  "co_spons_filter", "status_filter", "committee_filter", "fund_filter", "subfund_filter", "session_filter"
)

exact_filters <- c(
  project_title    = "title_filter",  project_year     = "year_filter",
  sponsoring_forum = "forum_filter",  project_status   = "status_filter",
  fund_account     = "fund_filter",   sub_fund         = "subfund_filter",
  project_session  = "session_filter", committee       = "committee_filter"
)

multi_filters <- c(
  proposing_economy       = "economy_filter",
  co_sponsoring_economies = "co_spons_filter",
  topics                  = "topics_filter"
)

# Reset all filter inputs to empty selection
observeEvent(input$reset_filters, {
  lapply(filter_ids, function(id) {
    if (id == "title_filter") updateSelectizeInput(session, id, selected = character(0))
    else                      updateSelectInput(session, id,    selected = character(0))
  })
})

# -------- Filtered dataset --------
bd_filtrada <- reactive({
  df <- bd
  for (col in names(exact_filters)) {
    sel <- clean_sel(input[[exact_filters[[col]]]])
    if (!is.null(sel)) df <- filter(df, .data[[col]] %in% sel)
  }
  for (col in names(multi_filters)) {
    sel <- clean_sel(input[[multi_filters[[col]]]])
    if (!is.null(sel)) {
      pat <- paste(sel, collapse = "|")
      df  <- filter(df, !is.na(.data[[col]]), str_detect(.data[[col]], pat))
    }
  }
  df
})

# -------- Export columns --------
# Columns used for XLSX download (full export)
cols_keep <- c(
  "project_title", "project_number", "proposing_economy", "project_year",
  "sponsoring_forum", "committee", "topics", "project_status", "project_session",
  "co_sponsoring_economies", "fund_account", "sub_fund",
  "total_project_budget", "apec_funding", "co_funding_amount", "econ_contribution",
  "other_fora_involved", "link"
)

bd_export <- reactive({
  bd_filtrada() |> select(any_of(cols_keep))
})

output$download_xlsx <- downloadHandler(
  filename = function() paste0("apec_projects_filtered_", Sys.Date(), ".xlsx"),
  content  = function(file) rio::export(bd_export(), file)
)

# -------- KPIs --------
kpi_data <- reactive({
  df         <- bd_filtrada()
  total_proj <- n_distinct(df$project_number)
  total_bud  <- sum(df$total_project_budget, na.rm = TRUE)
  self_n     <- sum(df$fund_account == "Self-Funded", na.rm = TRUE)
  list(
    total_proj      = total_proj,
    total_budget_m  = total_bud / 1e6,
    avg_budget_m    = if (total_proj > 0) total_bud / total_proj / 1e6 else NA_real_,
    share_self_fund = if (total_proj > 0) 100 * self_n / total_proj    else NA_real_
  )
})

output$kpi_row <- renderUI({
  k <- kpi_data()

  small_icon <- function(icon_name)
    tags$span(fa_i(icon_name), style = "font-size:0.7rem; margin-right:1px;")

  kpi_css <- tags$style("
    .small-kpi.card            { margin-bottom:0rem; max-height:80px; }
    .small-kpi .card-body      { padding:0.15rem 0.3rem; }
    .small-kpi .value-box-title {
      font-size:0.8rem !important; margin-bottom:0.05rem;
      white-space:nowrap; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis;
    }
    .small-kpi .value-box-value   { font-size:1.1rem !important; line-height:1.1; font-weight:bold; }
    .small-kpi .value-box-showcase { font-size:1.0rem !important; margin-right:0.25rem; }
    .small-kpi .value-box-showcase span { font-size:0.8rem !important; }
  ")

  small_box <- function(...) value_box(..., class = "small-kpi")

  div(
    id = "kpi-container", style = "max-height:80px; overflow:hidden;",
    tagList(
      kpi_css,
      layout_columns(
        col_widths = c(3, 3, 3, 3),
        small_box("Projects",
                  formatC(k$total_proj, big.mark = ","),
                  showcase = small_icon("layer-group"),
                  theme = value_box_theme(bg = pal[1], fg = "white")),
        small_box("Total project value in US$ Millions",
                  sprintf("%.1f", k$total_budget_m),
                  showcase = small_icon("dollar-sign"),
                  theme = value_box_theme(bg = pal[2], fg = "white")),
        small_box("Average project value in US$ Millions",
                  sprintf("%.2f", k$avg_budget_m),
                  showcase = small_icon("chart-column"),
                  theme = value_box_theme(bg = pal[3], fg = "white")),
        small_box("Self-funding share",
                  sprintf("%.1f", k$share_self_fund),
                  showcase = small_icon("percent"),
                  theme = value_box_theme(bg = pal[4], fg = "white"))
      )
    )
  )
})

# -------- Trend helpers --------
get_trend_colors <- function(cats, palette = pal) {
  cats <- sort(unique(cats))
  setNames(rep_len(palette, length(cats)), cats)
}

# Top categories by budget within the filtered dataset
top_categories_by_budget <- function(df, dim, top_n) {
  if (!nrow(df)) return(character(0))

  other_label <- "Not Applicable / Other"

  cats <- if (dim == "economy") {
    build_long_split(filter(df, econ_contribution > 0), "proposing_economy", "econ_contribution") |>
      group_by(proposing_economy) |>
      summarise(total_budget = sum(part, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
      arrange(desc(total_budget)) |> pull(proposing_economy)

  } else if (dim == "topic") {
    build_long_split(filter(df, !is.na(total_project_budget)), "topics", "total_project_budget") |>
      group_by(topics) |>
      summarise(total_budget = sum(part, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
      arrange(desc(total_budget)) |> pull(topics)

  } else {
    col_sym <- sym(if (dim == "forum") "sponsoring_forum" else "committee")
    df |>
      filter(!is.na(!!col_sym)) |>
      group_by(!!col_sym) |>
      summarise(total_budget = sum(total_project_budget, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
      arrange(desc(total_budget)) |> pull(!!col_sym)
  }

  if (!length(cats)) return(character(0))

  # Always push "Not Applicable / Other" to the end for committees
  if (dim == "committee" && other_label %in% cats)
    cats <- c(setdiff(cats, other_label), other_label)

  head(cats, top_n)
}

# Project count trend series
build_trend_projects <- function(df, dim, top_cats) {
  if (!nrow(df) || !length(top_cats)) return(NULL)

  if (dim %in% c("economy", "topic")) {
    col     <- if (dim == "economy") "proposing_economy" else "topics"
    col_sym <- sym(col)

    df_long <- unnest_semicolon(df, col) |>
      group_by(project_year, project_number) |>
      mutate(n_cat = n(), weight = 1 / n_cat) |>
      ungroup()

    agg <- df_long |>
      filter(!!col_sym %in% top_cats) |>
      group_by(project_year, !!col_sym) |>
      summarise(frac_projects = sum(weight, na.rm = TRUE),
                n_projects    = n_distinct(project_number), .groups = "drop")

    totals_frac <- agg |>
      group_by(project_year) |>
      summarise(total_frac = sum(frac_projects, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

    agg |>
      left_join(totals_frac, by = "project_year") |>
      mutate(share = if_else(total_frac > 0, 100 * frac_projects / total_frac, 0),
             value = n_projects) |>
      rename(year = project_year, category = !!col_sym) |>
      arrange(year, category)

  } else {
    col_sym <- sym(if (dim == "forum") "sponsoring_forum" else "committee")
    agg <- df |>
      filter(!is.na(!!col_sym)) |>
      group_by(project_year, !!col_sym) |>
      summarise(n_projects = n_distinct(project_number), .groups = "drop")
    if (!nrow(agg)) return(NULL)
    agg_with_share(agg, "n_projects") |>
      mutate(value = n_projects) |>
      filter(!!col_sym %in% top_cats) |>
      rename(year = project_year, category = !!col_sym) |>
      arrange(year, category)
  }
}

# Budget trend series (MM USD)
build_trend_budget <- function(df, dim, top_cats) {
  if (!nrow(df) || !length(top_cats)) return(NULL)

  if (dim %in% c("economy", "topic")) {
    col      <- if (dim == "economy") "proposing_economy" else "topics"
    wgt_col  <- if (dim == "economy") "econ_contribution" else "total_project_budget"
    df_filt  <- if (dim == "economy") filter(df, econ_contribution > 0)
                else                  filter(df, !is.na(total_project_budget))
    col_sym  <- sym(col)

    df_long <- build_long_split(df_filt, col, wgt_col)
    if (!nrow(df_long)) return(NULL)

    agg <- df_long |>
      filter(!!col_sym %in% top_cats) |>
      group_by(project_year, !!col_sym) |>
      summarise(amount = sum(part, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

    agg_with_share(agg, "amount") |>
      mutate(value = amount / 1e6) |>
      rename(year = project_year, category = !!col_sym) |>
      arrange(year, category)

  } else {
    col_sym <- sym(if (dim == "forum") "sponsoring_forum" else "committee")
    agg <- df |>
      filter(!is.na(!!col_sym)) |>
      group_by(project_year, !!col_sym) |>
      summarise(amount = sum(total_project_budget, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
    if (!nrow(agg)) return(NULL)
    agg_with_share(agg, "amount") |>
      mutate(value = amount / 1e6) |>
      filter(!!col_sym %in% top_cats) |>
      rename(year = project_year, category = !!col_sym) |>
      arrange(year, category)
  }
}

# -------- Plots --------

# 1) Project count: by year / by forum / heatmap
output$proj_plot <- renderPlotly({
  df   <- bd_filtrada()
  if (!nrow(df)) return(NULL)
  view <- req(input$proj_view)

  if (view == "year") {
    df_y <- count(df, project_year, name = "n") |> arrange(project_year)
    total_p <- sum(df_y$n)
    df_y <- mutate(df_y, share = if (total_p > 0) 100 * n / total_p else NA_real_)
    return(
      plot_ly(df_y, x = ~project_year, y = ~n, type = "bar",
              marker = list(color = cols$year_bar), text = ~n, textposition = "outside",
              customdata = ~share,
              hovertemplate = "Year: %{x}<br>Projects: %{y}<br>Share: %{customdata:.1f}%<extra></extra>") |>
        layout(title = "Projects by year",
               xaxis = list(title = "Year"), yaxis = list(title = "Number of projects"),
               uniformtext = list(minsize = 10, mode = "hide"))
    )
  }

  if (view == "forum") {
    df_f <- df |>
      filter(!is.na(sponsoring_forum)) |>
      group_by(sponsoring_forum) |>
      summarise(n = n_distinct(project_number), .groups = "drop")
    if (!nrow(df_f)) return(NULL)
    total_p <- sum(df_f$n)
    df_f <- df_f |>
      mutate(share = if (total_p > 0) round(100 * n / total_p, 1) else 0) |>
      arrange(desc(n)) |>
      mutate(sponsoring_forum = factor(sponsoring_forum, levels = rev(sponsoring_forum)))
    return(
      plot_ly(df_f, x = ~n, y = ~sponsoring_forum, type = "bar", orientation = "h",
              marker = list(color = cols$forum_bar), text = ~n, textposition = "outside",
              customdata = ~share,
              hovertemplate = "Forum: %{y}<br>Projects: %{x}<br>Share: %{customdata:.1f}%<extra></extra>") |>
        layout(title = "Projects by forum",
               xaxis = list(title = "Number of projects"), yaxis = list(title = ""))
    )
  }

  if (view == "year_forum") {
    df_h <- df |>
      count(project_year, sponsoring_forum, name = "n") |>
      complete(project_year     = sort(unique(df$project_year)),
               sponsoring_forum = sort(unique(df$sponsoring_forum)),
               fill = list(n = 0)) |>
      mutate(project_year = factor(project_year, levels = sort(unique(df$project_year))))
    if (!nrow(df_h)) return(NULL)
    return(
      plot_ly(df_h, x = ~project_year, y = ~sponsoring_forum, z = ~n, type = "heatmap",
              colorscale   = list(list(0, cols$heat_low), list(0.5, cols$heat_mid), list(1, cols$heat_high)),
              reversescale = FALSE,
              hovertemplate = "Year: %{x}<br>Forum: %{y}<br>Projects: %{z}<extra></extra>") |>
        layout(title = "Projects by year and forum",
               xaxis = list(title = "Year"), yaxis = list(title = "Forum"))
    )
  }
  NULL
})

# 2) Budget: total by year + stacked area by funding source
output$budget_comp_plot <- renderPlotly({
  df   <- bd_filtrada()
  if (!nrow(df)) return(NULL)
  view <- req(input$budget_view)

  if (identical(view, "Total budget (MM USD)")) {
    df_t <- df |>
      group_by(project_year) |>
      summarise(total = sum(total_project_budget, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
      mutate(total_m = total / 1e6)
    grand_total <- sum(df_t$total_m, na.rm = TRUE)
    df_t <- mutate(df_t, share = if (grand_total > 0) 100 * total_m / grand_total else NA_real_)
    return(
      plot_ly(df_t, x = ~project_year, y = ~total_m, type = "bar",
              marker = list(color = cols$total), text = ~paste0(round(total_m, 1), " M"),
              textposition = "outside", customdata = ~share,
              hovertemplate = "Year: %{x}<br>Total budget: %{y:.1f} M<br>Share: %{customdata:.1f}%<extra></extra>") |>
        layout(title = "Project value by year",
               xaxis = list(title = "Year"),
               yaxis = list(title = "US$ (Millions)", tickformat = ".1~f"))
    )
  }

  if (identical(view, "Budget composition by type of financing")) {
    df_fin <- df |>
      mutate(
        is_self     = fund_account == "Self-Funded",
        apec_part   = if_else(is_self, 0, pmax(total_project_budget - co_funding_amount, 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
        cofund_part = if_else(is_self, 0, co_funding_amount),
        self_part   = if_else(is_self, total_project_budget, 0)
      ) |>
      group_by(project_year) |>
      summarise(apec   = sum(apec_part,   na.rm = TRUE),
                cofund = sum(cofund_part, na.rm = TRUE),
                self   = sum(self_part,   na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
      mutate(across(c(apec, cofund, self), ~ . / 1e6, .names = "{.col}_m"),
             total_m = apec_m + cofund_m + self_m)

    return(
      plot_ly(df_fin, x = ~project_year) |>
        add_trace(y = ~apec_m,   type = "scatter", mode = "none", stackgroup = "one",
                  name = "APEC-funding",      fillcolor = cols$apec,
                  customdata = ~total_m,
                  hovertemplate = "Year %{x}<br>APEC: %{y:.1f} M<br>Total: %{customdata:.1f} M<extra></extra>") |>
        add_trace(y = ~cofund_m, type = "scatter", mode = "none", stackgroup = "one",
                  name = "Economy co-funding", fillcolor = cols$cofund,
                  customdata = ~total_m,
                  hovertemplate = "Year %{x}<br>Co-funding: %{y:.1f} M<br>Total: %{customdata:.1f} M<extra></extra>") |>
        add_trace(y = ~self_m,   type = "scatter", mode = "none", stackgroup = "one",
                  name = "Self-funding",       fillcolor = cols$other,
                  customdata = ~total_m,
                  hovertemplate = "Year %{x}<br>Self-funded: %{y:.1f} M<br>Total: %{customdata:.1f} M<extra></extra>") |>
        add_trace(y = ~total_m,  type = "scatter", mode = "lines", name = "Total",
                  line = list(color = "rgba(0,0,0,0.6)", width = 2),
                  hovertemplate = "Year %{x}<br>Total: %{y:.1f} M<extra></extra>") |>
        layout(title  = "Project value by source",
               xaxis  = list(title = "Year"),
               yaxis  = list(title = "US$ (Millions)", tickformat = ".1~f"),
               legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.2))
    )
  }
  NULL
})

# 3) Trends over time
output$trend_plot <- renderPlotly({
  df        <- bd_filtrada()
  if (!nrow(df)) return(NULL)
  dim_input <- req(input$trend_dim)
  metric    <- req(input$trend_metric)

  dim_map    <- c(Economies = "economy", Forums = "forum", Committees = "committee", Topics = "topic")
  label_map  <- c(economy = "Economy",   forum = "Forum",  committee = "Committee",  topic = "Topic")
  plural_map <- c(economy = "Economies", forum = "Forums", committee = "Committees", topic = "Topics")
  dim    <- dim_map[[dim_input]]
  top_n  <- 5L

  # If the dimension filter is active, use its selection as categories
  selected_econ  <- clean_sel(input$economy_filter)
  selected_topic <- clean_sel(input$topics_filter)
  top_cats <- if (dim == "economy" && !is.null(selected_econ)) selected_econ
              else if (dim == "topic" && !is.null(selected_topic)) selected_topic
              else top_categories_by_budget(df, dim, top_n)

  if (!length(top_cats)) return(NULL)

  df_trend <- if (metric == "Projects") build_trend_projects(df, dim, top_cats)
              else                      build_trend_budget(df, dim, top_cats)
  if (is.null(df_trend) || !nrow(df_trend)) return(NULL)

  cats <- sort(unique(df_trend$category))
  # Push "Not Applicable / Other" to the end for committees
  if (dim == "committee" && "Not Applicable / Other" %in% cats)
    cats <- c(setdiff(cats, "Not Applicable / Other"), "Not Applicable / Other")

  df_trend$category <- factor(df_trend$category, levels = cats)
  col_vec           <- get_trend_colors(cats, trend_pal)

  yaxis_title <- if (metric == "Projects") "Number of projects" else "US$ (Millions)"
  tick_fmt    <- if (metric == "Projects") "d" else ".1~f"
  htmpl <- if (metric == "Projects")
    paste0(label_map[[dim]], ": %{text}<br>Year: %{x}<br>Projects: %{y}<extra></extra>")
  else
    paste0(label_map[[dim]], ": %{text}<br>Year: %{x}<br>Budget: %{y:.2f} M<extra></extra>")

  p <- plot_ly()
  for (cat in cats) {
    df_cat <- df_trend[df_trend$category == cat, ]
    p <- add_trace(p,
      data = df_cat, x = ~year, y = ~value, type = "scatter",
      mode   = if (nrow(df_cat) == 1) "markers" else "lines",
      name   = as.character(cat),
      line   = if (nrow(df_cat) == 1) NULL else list(color = col_vec[as.character(cat)], width = 2),
      marker = list(color = col_vec[as.character(cat)], size = 10),
      text   = ~category, hovertemplate = htmpl
    )
  }

  p |> layout(
    title     = paste0(plural_map[[dim]], " – ",
                       if (metric == "Projects") "projects" else "project budget", " over time"),
    xaxis     = list(title = "Year"),
    yaxis     = list(title = yaxis_title, tickformat = tick_fmt),
    legend    = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.2),
    hovermode = "x unified"
  )
})

# 4) Data table
output$tabla_proyectos_budget <- renderDT({
  df <- bd_filtrada()

  # Build display-only cost columns based on funding type
  df_table <- df |>
    mutate(
      # Total cost: unified budget for all project types
      total_cost_usd    = total_project_budget,
      # APEC contribution: 0 for self-funded, apec_funding otherwise
      apec_funding_usd  = apec_funding,
      # Economy co-funding: 0 for self-funded, co_funding_amount otherwise
      co_funding_usd    = co_funding_amount,
      # Self-funded amount: only populated for Self-Funded projects
      self_funded_usd   = if_else(fund_account == "Self-Funded", total_project_budget, 0),
      # Clickable link; empty string if missing
      link = if_else(
        !is.na(link) & link != "",
        sprintf('<a href="%s" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">View</a>', link),
        ""
      )
    ) |>
    # Select and order display columns only
    select(
      project_title, project_number, proposing_economy, project_year,
      sponsoring_forum, fund_account, project_status,
      total_cost_usd, apec_funding_usd, co_funding_usd, self_funded_usd,
      link
    )

  DT::datatable(
    df_table,
    options  = list(pageLength = 25, scrollX = TRUE),
    rownames = FALSE,
    escape   = FALSE   # allow HTML in link column
  )
})
```

## 

### KPI's {height="120px"}

```{r}
uiOutput("kpi_row")
```

### Row

#### Plots {.tabset}

##### Number of projects

```{r}
selectInput(
  "proj_view", "View:",
  choices  = c("By year" = "year", "By forum" = "forum", "By year and forum" = "year_forum"),
  selected = "year"
)
plotlyOutput("proj_plot", height = "500px")
```

##### Project value

```{r}
selectInput(
  "budget_view", "View:",
  choices  = c("By year" = "Total budget (MM USD)", "By source" = "Budget composition by type of financing"),
  selected = "Total budget (MM USD)"
)
plotlyOutput("budget_comp_plot", height = "500px")
```

##### Trends over time

```{r}
selectInput(
  "trend_dim", "Dimension:",
  choices  = c("Economies", "Forums", "Committees", "Topics"),
  selected = "Economies"
)
radioButtons(
  "trend_metric", "Metric:",
  choices  = c("Projects", "Budget"),
  selected = "Projects", inline = TRUE
)
plotlyOutput("trend_plot", height = "500px")
```

##### Data

```{r}
DTOutput("tabla_proyectos_budget")
```
